name: Task Output Management
description: Creates and manages per-task output tabs in the UI, handles ANSI-stripped streaming output rendering, supports Gemini image galleries, manages overflow when output exceeds the cap, and provides follow-up output injection.

  L223: TryInjectSubtaskResult(AgentTask child, ObservableCollection<AgentTask> activeTasks, ObservableCollection<AgentTask> historyTasks) -> void  // Synchronous wrapper kept for backward compatibility (non-UI-thread callers).
  L299: InjectSubtaskResult(AgentTask parent, AgentTask child) -> void  // Synchronous wrapper kept for backward compatibility (non-UI-thread callers).

patterns: Tab-per-task with lazy recreation for running history tasks
dependencies: WPF RichTextBox and TabControl for rendering
